entity.label: Ammiel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the twelve spies sent by Moses to search the land of Canaan (Num. 13:12). He was one of the ten who perished by the plague for their unfavourable report (Num. 14:37).

nodes.label: Ammiel
nodes.description: One of the twelve spies sent by Moses to search the land of Canaan (Num. 13:12). He was one of the ten who perished by the plague for their unfavourable report (Num. 14:37).

verses.text: Of the tribe of Dan, Ammiel the son of Gemalli.
